title: Big Phish
relevance_summary: Phishing attack targeting validator signatures on a DeFi network

prevention.rule: Block any tx that attempts to sign a message or transfer validator signatures
prevention.trigger: SIGNATURE_TRANSFER -> validator signature transfer in single tx

red_flags: malicious document shared via Google Drive
monitoring_rules: Block any tx that attempts to sign a message or transfer validator signatures
summary: The Lazarus Group, a North Korean state-sponsored hacking collective, exploited a small validator set on the Ronin Network to steal over $600 million. They used phishing to gain access to validator signatures.
